title: Kofi's Wiggly Day
synopsis: Kofi can't stop wiggling! His constant movement causes hilarious mishaps at home and school until his friends help him discover that his wiggly energy is actually his superpower for making everyone laugh and have fun.

pages.text: Kofi woke up feeling extra wiggly. His toes wiggled in his socks. His fingers wiggled in the air. His whole body wanted to wiggle, wiggle, wiggle!

illustration.description: Kofi, a boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, bouncing on his bed with exaggerated stretchy limbs flailing everywhere, his pajamas twisted and hair sticking up, surrounded by floating motion lines and bouncing pillows in candy bright colors
illustration.alt: Kofi wiggling energetically on his bed with motion lines showing movement

pages.text: At breakfast, Kofi's wiggling made his spoon dance. Cereal flew everywhere! Splash! His milk jumped out of the bowl and onto his nose.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, sitting at a bright yellow table with his spoon stretched like rubber, cereal pieces flying in cartoon arcs through the air, milk droplets suspended mid-splash, his oversized surprised expression with milk dripping from his nose
illustration.alt: Kofi at breakfast with cereal and milk flying everywhere due to his wiggling

pages.text: "Oh my!" laughed Mom. "You're extra wiggly today, Kofi!" She helped him clean up the cereal mess. Kofi tried to sit still, but his body just wanted to wiggle more!

illustration.description: Mom and Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, cleaning up scattered cereal pieces, Kofi's body impossibly twisted and bouncy while trying to help, his expression showing he's fighting against his natural urge to wiggle, bright candy colors everywhere
illustration.alt: Kofi and his mom cleaning up the breakfast mess while Kofi continues wiggling

pages.text: At school, Kofi's wiggling caused all sorts of funny problems. During art time, his paintbrush wiggled and made rainbow squiggles all over his paper. "Oops!" he giggled.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, holding a paintbrush that's stretched and curved like spaghetti, creating wild rainbow squiggles across his paper and easel, paint splatters in bright candy colors floating in the air around him, his expression delightfully surprised
illustration.alt: Kofi painting with exaggerated wiggly movements creating colorful squiggles

pages.text: During story time, Kofi wiggled so much he rolled right off his carpet square! He tumbled like a bouncy ball and landed in a pile of soft pillows. BOING!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, mid-tumble with his body squashed and stretched like a rubber ball, bouncing off colorful carpet squares and landing in an explosion of bright pillows, other children watching with oversized amazed expressions, motion lines showing his bouncy trajectory
illustration.alt: Kofi bouncing off his carpet square and tumbling into pillows during story time

pages.text: His teacher, Ms. Garcia, smiled kindly. "Kofi, maybe you need to wiggle outside for a few minutes?" But even at recess, Kofi's wiggling made the swings twist in circles and the slide became extra slippery!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, on a playground where everything is comically affected by his wiggling - swings twisted like corkscrews, slide covered in exaggerated motion lines, his body stretched and bouncy, surrounded by bright candy-colored playground equipment that seems to be wiggling along with him
illustration.alt: Kofi at recess where his wiggling affects all the playground equipment

pages.text: Kofi felt sad. "My wiggling causes too many problems," he sighed. He sat on the grass and tried very, very hard not to wiggle. But that made him feel all tight and uncomfortable inside.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, sitting cross-legged on bright green grass, his body unnaturally stiff and compressed like a tightly wound spring, his expression showing discomfort and sadness, dark storm clouds in cartoon style hovering over him while the sun shines elsewhere
illustration.alt: Kofi sitting sadly on grass trying not to wiggle, looking uncomfortable

pages.text: His best friend Maya ran over. "Kofi! Why do you look so squished up?" she asked. "I was trying not to wiggle," Kofi said. "But wiggling is what makes you YOU!" Maya laughed. "And it's super fun!"

illustration.description: Maya, a cheerful girl, approaching the compressed and sad Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, her arms outstretched with an oversized happy expression, while Kofi remains tightly wound up like a spring, the contrast between their body language exaggerated in bright candy colors
illustration.alt: Maya approaching sad, compressed Kofi who is trying not to wiggle

pages.text: "Really?" Kofi asked. Maya nodded. "Watch this!" She started wiggling too! Soon, other kids joined in. They wiggled their arms, wiggled their legs, and wiggled their whole bodies together!

illustration.description: Maya and several children all wiggling together in a group, with Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, in the center, everyone's bodies stretched and squashed in exaggerated cartoon motions, surrounded by swirling motion lines and bright candy colors, all faces showing pure joy and laughter
illustration.alt: Maya and other children all wiggling together joyfully with Kofi

pages.text: "This is the wiggliest, giggliest fun ever!" shouted Sam. "Kofi, you're the best wiggle friend!" Everyone was laughing and wiggling together. Kofi felt so happy that his wiggling made others smile too!

illustration.description: A group of diverse children all wiggling in a circle around Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, everyone's bodies impossibly stretchy and bouncy, huge smiles and laughter expressions, hearts and stars floating in the bright candy-colored air around them, motion lines creating a joyful wiggle tornado effect
illustration.alt: Children dancing and wiggling in a circle around happy Kofi

pages.text: From that day on, Kofi learned that being wiggly wasn't a problem - it was his special gift! He became the official Wiggle Leader at recess, teaching everyone the most amazing wiggle dances ever!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, standing proudly with a makeshift crown made of wiggling ribbons, surrounded by children copying his exaggerated dance moves, everyone's bodies stretched and bouncy, set against a bright rainbow background with musical notes and motion lines dancing through the air
illustration.alt: Kofi as the Wiggle Leader teaching other children wiggle dances

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: What happened when Kofi ate breakfast?
questions.explanation: Kofi's wiggling made his spoon dance and cereal flew everywhere, even getting milk on his nose!

questions.question: How did Kofi feel when he tried not to wiggle?
questions.explanation: When Kofi tried very hard not to wiggle, he felt all tight and uncomfortable inside because wiggling is part of who he is.

questions.question: What did Maya tell Kofi about his wiggling?
choices: It makes him special and fun
questions.explanation: Maya told Kofi that wiggling is what makes him special and that it's super fun!

questions.question: What happened during art time at school?
questions.explanation: During art time, Kofi's wiggling paintbrush made rainbow squiggles all over his paper.

questions.question: What did Kofi become at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Kofi became the official Wiggle Leader at recess, teaching everyone amazing wiggle dances!
